title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.0 — C1 UI, stage 1: value controls (DRIVE/TONE/WEAR/MIX/INPUT/THRESH/... every ParamSlider) render as C1 value-tiles — label + big value + a thin heat strip that fills/warms with value, no protruding thumb. Pure front-end (ParamSlider paint only), DSP untouched, zero layout change. Confirm the value-tile look feels right in a DAW. Stage 2 (v0.4.1): full tile-GRID layout — selectors → tiles/dropdowns, COMPRESS→GRIT→AMBER reorder, AMBER vertical stage-tags, top-down GR meters, header restyle, GRIT SPEED/CAL/BIAS/AGE → TWEAK.
